events.notes: Independent GPT-5.4 CloudWarm reproduction is blocked by Codex task-level ERROR outcomes. Local C5 checks do not substitute for Gate 6. D5/E6 is not earned. Superseded by EVID-CLEAN-REVIEW-BOTTLENECK after local bottleneck diagnosis.

events.notes: Both failed verifier attempts are retained. Database restore followed demonstrated corruption and used a snapshot that passed integrity_check inside the Docker locking domain. This local evidence does not satisfy Gate 6.
